fieldValues.value:
`discovery.json` schema + conformance fixture landed. `ext:discovery` extension record and R1–R12 invariants NOT yet folded (grandfathered — see #206).

<!-- srs-integration:v1
schema:discovery.json
-->

Defines a portable Discovery Contract (structured filter axes), a deterministic Text Projection, normalization rules, and an opt-in `ext:discovery` extension, plus a conformance fixture. The `discovery.json` schema and `conformance/discovery/` fixture landed; the `ext:discovery` extension record and R1–R12 global invariants are not yet authored. Full text: rfcs/rfc-012-discovery-contract-text-projection.md.
